Heat oil in a high walled sauce pan until ~265°F
Add herbs, remove from heat and allow to cool.  Can use an ice bath, or reserve to shallow hotel pan in blast chiller.
Once cool, blend in vitamix blender until smooth.
Reserve in quart containers in cooler.
